name: Modern Landing Page
description: A high-conversion marketing landing page: a hero with a clear value proposition and primary CTA, social proof, a benefits/features section, and a conversion-focused footer. Uses a clean modern type system, generous whitespace, and a single accent color.

requiredElements.name: hero-value-prop
requiredElements.description: A hero section with a concise headline stating the core value proposition (<=12 words).

requiredElements.name: primary-cta
requiredElements.description: One obvious primary call-to-action button in the hero (above the fold) with a contrasting accent color.

requiredElements.name: social-proof
requiredElements.description: Social proof: testimonials, logo bar, or trust metrics near or below the hero.

requiredElements.name: benefits-section
requiredElements.description: A benefits/features section with 3-6 items, each a clear benefit (outcome) not just a feature.

requiredElements.name: viewport-meta
requiredElements.description: A responsive viewport meta tag so the page scales on mobile.

requiredElements.name: single-accent
requiredElements.description: A single accent/brand color used consistently for CTAs and highlights; rest of palette neutral.

optionalElements.name: sticky-header
optionalElements.description: A sticky header that keeps the CTA reachable while scrolling.

optionalElements.name: pricing-table
optionalElements.description: A pricing/comparison table for products with multiple tiers.

optionalElements.name: faq
optionalElements.description: An FAQ section answering common objections before the final CTA.

optionalElements.name: final-cta
optionalElements.description: A final closing CTA section before the footer reinforcing the primary action.

qualityRules.description: Hero value prop is the first thing the eye lands on (size/weight hierarchy).
Generous whitespace; sections breathe, not cramped.
Primary CTA stands out via accent color and size against neutrals.
A consistent type scale and single heading font family throughout.
Section padding and gaps follow a consistent spacing scale.
CTA has hover/focus/active states and clear affordance.
Uses semantic landmarks (header/main/section/footer) and a single h1.
Layout reflows on mobile (single-column, readable, no horizontal scroll).
Images use width/height or aspect-ratio to prevent CLS; lazy-loaded below the fold.

antiPatterns.description: Multiple competing primary CTAs in the hero dilute the action.
Listing raw features instead of benefits (outcomes) fails to persuade.
Fixed widths causing horizontal scroll on mobile.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a closing CTA section to capture users who scrolled to the end.
Add an FAQ to address objections before the final CTA.
Make the header sticky so the CTA stays reachable.

exampleOutputs.label: Hero with value prop + CTA
exampleOutputs.snippet:
